gestures.mdmPrompt: a person stands centered, opens arms wide while smiling, and leans slightly forward to engage listeners.
a tutor steps to the side, points towards an imaginary chart, while clearly stating the problem with enthusiasm.
the person leans forward slightly, raises both hands, and counts out loud while engaging the audience.
a tutor shifts weight to one side, points clearly with the left hand while inviting answers with a smile.
the person stands tall, spreads arms outward, and emphasizes the question with a warm expression while looking around.
the tutor steps back slightly, opens arms wide, and gestures toward an imaginary rectangle, smiling to clarify the concept.
a person faces forward confidently, points to an imaginary board while enthusiastically introducing the new example.
the person stands firmly, raises both hands slightly, and emphasizes the question with a relaxed smile and approachable stance.
